workContext.summary: Working on DeerFlow memory management UX, including local search, local filters, clear-all, and single-fact deletion in Settings > Memory.

personalContext.summary: Prefers Chinese during collaboration, but wants GitHub PR titles and bodies written in English with a Chinese translation provided alongside them.

topOfMind.summary: Wants reviewers to be able to reproduce the memory search and filter flow quickly with pre-populated sample data.

recentMonths.summary: Recently contributed multiple DeerFlow pull requests covering memory, uploads, and compatibility fixes.

earlierContext.summary: Often prefers shipping smaller, reviewable changes with explicit validation notes.

longTermBackground.summary: Actively building open-source contribution experience and improving end-to-end delivery quality.

facts.content: User prefers Chinese for day-to-day collaboration.
PR titles and bodies should be drafted in English and accompanied by a Chinese translation.
User implemented memory search and filter improvements in the DeerFlow settings page.
User added clear-all memory support through the gateway memory API.
User added single-fact deletion support for persisted memory entries.
Reviewer can search for keyword memory to see multiple matching facts.
Reviewer can search for keyword Chinese to verify cross-category matching.
Reviewer can search for workflow to verify category text is included in local filtering.
Delete fact testing can target this disposable sample entry.
This sample fact is intended for edit testing.
